scripts.wait-server: sh -c 'URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:${PHP_PORT:-8000}}; for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl -sSf "$URL" >/dev/null && exit 0 || sleep 1; done; echo "Server not reachable at $URL" >&2; exit 1'
scripts.e2e: npm run wait-server && sh -c 'BASE_URL=${BASE_URL:-http://localhost:${PHP_PORT:-8000}} npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.cjs'
